rationale: Recent active-side CEX incident package for WOO X. WOO X is modeled as an active centralized exchange with a July 2025 contained incident / unauthorized-withdrawal breach affecting nine user accounts, temporary withdrawal suspension, and full-compensation commitment. This is not a shutdown record.

entities.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency trading platform associated with WOO Network. In July 2025 it reported a contained incident in which nine user accounts suffered unauthorized withdrawals totaling about USD 14 million; withdrawals were temporarily paused and the exchange said affected users would be fully covered.
entities.notes: Do not mark dead. The July 2025 incident caused unauthorized withdrawals and a temporary withdrawal pause, but available evidence describes a contained incident, full compensation, and continued trading rather than a terminal shutdown.

events.title: WOO X reported unauthorized withdrawals from nine accounts
events.description: WOO X reported a contained incident in which nine user accounts experienced unauthorized withdrawals totaling about USD 14 million, while saying the affected users would be fully covered.
events.notes: Use hack as the nearest HEI enum for an unauthorized-withdrawal breach; wording should preserve that the incident was account-level and contained according to WOO X.

events.title: WOO X temporarily paused withdrawals
events.description: As a precaution after the unauthorized-withdrawal incident, WOO X temporarily suspended withdrawals while completing an internal review and coordinating with security teams and other exchanges.
events.notes: Temporary withdrawal pause only; not a shutdown or global trading halt.

events.title: WOO X committed to cover all unauthorized withdrawals
events.description: WOO X said affected users had been contacted and that all unauthorized withdrawals would be fully covered, supporting active-side treatment rather than dead or insolvent classification.
events.notes: Modeled as other because HEI has no compensation_commitment enum.

evidence.title: Temporary withdrawal suspension - July 24, 2025
evidence.notes: Primary source for the contained incident, nine affected accounts, unauthorized-withdrawal coverage, and temporary withdrawal suspension.

evidence.title: Trading platform WOO X pauses withdrawals after $14M breach
evidence.notes: Used for USD 14M loss estimate, nine affected accounts, withdrawal pause, and contained-incident framing.

evidence.title: Centralized exchange WOO X investigates 'contained incident' resulting in estimated $14 million loss
evidence.notes: Used for CEX classification, contained-incident wording, estimated USD 14M loss, and customer-coverage statement.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange WOO X suspends withdrawals, users hacked for $14M
evidence.notes: Supporting source for the temporary withdrawal freeze, user-loss coverage, and external security/exchange coordination.

manual_review_checklist: Confirm WOO X is not already canonical before apply; if existing, update rather than duplicate.
Keep WOO X active; this is an unauthorized-withdrawal / temporary withdrawal-suspension incident, not a shutdown.
Use event ids hei_ev_000413 through hei_ev_000415 only if available.
Use evidence ids hei_src_000825 through hei_src_000828 only if available.
